title: Verify approval evidence for a deploy
description: Confirm a pending change carries independent, change-bound approval and a linked authorized request.
body: Use when validating that a deploy may proceed under change control. Procedure: locate the approval record for the exact artifact, confirm the approver differs from the author, confirm the approval references this artifact and not an earlier one, and confirm a linked authorized change request predates the change. Report which conditions hold and which fail. This skill exposes findings only; it must never itself approve or trigger a production deploy, which is denied and routed to a human. Validation signals include a recorded decision with the approval, author, and request ids. Risk boundary: a self-approved, mismatched, or unlinked deploy is blocking and must not be reported as ready.
